tagline.en: The first frost could come any night now!
tagline.da: Den foerste frost kan komme hvilken som helst nat nu!

theme.hero_task: Check the garden on a frosty morning for ice crystals

tasks.action: Morning frost patrol: check for ice crystals on leaves

prompt.en: Look at the leaves early in the morning -- can you see sparkly ice crystals?
prompt.da: Kig paa bladene tidligt om morgenen -- kan du se funklende iskrystaller?

tasks.action: Cover tender plants with fleece if frost forecast

prompt.en: Drape fleece over Bed C and Bed E if frost is forecast tonight.
prompt.da: Laeg fiberdug over Bed C og Bed E hvis der er frost i aftens vejrudsigt.

tasks.action: Harvest any remaining peppers or tomatoes before frost

prompt.en: Frost kills tomatoes and peppers -- pick everything left!
prompt.da: Frost draeber tomater og peberfrugter -- pluk alt der er tilbage!

prompt.en: Kale laughs at frost! It's one of the last plants standing.
prompt.da: Groenkal griner af frost! Den er en af de sidste planter der staar.

tasks.action: Add mulch to all beds for winter protection

prompt.en: Spread leaves or straw over the soil like a winter blanket for the worms.
prompt.da: Spred blade eller halm over jorden som et vintertaeppe til ormene.

growth_events.event: Kale surviving frost -- leaves may have frost damage on edges but center grows on

prompt.en: The kale is tough! Even after frost, the middle keeps growing new leaves.
prompt.da: Groenkaalen er sej! Selv efter frost bliver midten ved med at lave nye blade.

growth_events.event: Thyme staying green -- semi-evergreen through winter

prompt.en: The thyme is still green! It stays green all winter -- you can pick it anytime.
prompt.da: Timianen er stadig groen! Den forbliver groen hele vinteren -- du kan plukke den naar som helst.
